meaning: n.作者的身份,著述业,(思想等的)原创作者,根源
examples: Questions arise over authorship and the determination of literary heirs.
New authorship defending methods based on identifying individual writing patterns are already here.
The authorship of the poem is unknown.
In their place we have a massive open writing arena and an arena of vetted authorship.
One of the challenges of Biblical scholarship is separating the different threads of authorship.
